calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

V. BLAIR SHAHBAZIAN, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL,

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) MCT ASSOCIATES INC. for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $47,624.70
Attorney's Fees - $6222.00
Costs - $201.00
Total judgment in the amount of $54,127.70

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
